query: Wishlist and gifting app complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: 10 Best Universal Wishlist Apps 2025 (Ranked & Reviewed)
results.content:
User reviews have declined substantially, with many complaints about the commercialized interface and reduced functionality. What was once a clean, simple platform is now frustrating to use with constant brand promotions and sponsored content.

✅ The Good

 ✅ Basic wishlist functionality still works
 ✅ Mobile app remains functional
 ✅ Simple list sharing via links

❌ The Bad

 ❌ Sold to private equity - now commercially driven
 ❌ Interface cluttered with ads and promoted brands
 ❌ Poor user reviews since ownership change
 ❌ Limited advanced features
 ❌ Basic store integration only
 ❌ No AI recommendations or smart features
 ❌ User experience has declined significantly
 ❌ Website performance is notably slow

## 6. Elfster

3.5/5

Elfster [...] ✅ The Good

 ✅ Good for family gift coordination
 ✅ Free to use
 ✅ Cross-platform availability
 ✅ Gift reservation system works

❌ The Bad

 ❌ Extremely outdated interface design
 ❌ Poor mobile app performance
 ❌ Limited customization options
 ❌ No modern features like price tracking
 ❌ Confusing navigation and setup
 ❌ Lacks integration with popular stores
 ❌ Website feels like it's from 2010

## 8. GiftList

2.5/5

GiftList

GiftList overpromises but underdelivers

GiftList markets itself aggressively as a comprehensive universal wishlist app with AI-powered features. However, our extensive testing reveals significant gaps between marketing promises and actual functionality, with poor execution of basic features and frustrating user experience issues. [...] ❌ The Bad

 ❌ Poor for individual wishlist management
 ❌ Outdated interface design
 ❌ Limited store integration
 ❌ Not ideal for everyday gift lists
 ❌ Focused only on group exchanges
 ❌ Mobile app performance could be better

## 7. Giftster

2.8/5

Giftster

Giftster focuses on families but suffers from outdated design

Giftster positions itself as a family-oriented gift registry with over 2 million users. While it succeeds in group coordination, the platform feels stuck in 2010 with poor mobile optimization and a confusing user interface that frustrates modern users.

The gift reservation system works well to prevent duplicate purchases, but the overall experience is hampered by dated design choices and limited feature set compared to modern alternatives.

✅ The Good

results.title: ‎Giftful - Wishlist & Registry - Ratings & Reviews - App Store
results.content:
### I love this app so much but…

So basically this app is really fun but for the past 2 weeks it hasn’t really been working whenever I try to delete something from my wishlist it doesn’t work also whenever I try to share my wishlist it doesn’t work. And I would really like to delete some stuff from my list cause my birthday is in about 2 weeks and my family needs my list. I honestly really like this app. It is a really good app to use for your wishlist! I just wish they could fix this bug!

Thank you for your review and feedback! We’d love to take a look and get that fixed up for you. Could you email cono@giftful.com so we can resolve any issues your having ASAP?

### Amazing!⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ [...] ### Very good!

I think it’s very good. I like that when you send your list to someone, it doesn’t require them to download the app or go through a bunch of complicated steps to buy or look over your list. I also like that you can add details, cause on other shopping list apps my dad always has to ask what color or what size I want the item to be in, and it’s annoying. Overall I love this app and will recommend it to anyone who is looking for a good shopping list app!

# Very good!

results.title: What do you think is the best wishlist app? : r/Gifts
results.content: As Christmas is coming up, I have been looking into different apps and websites that are not only easy for me to use, but also easy for my family members to use when either making their own lists or just accessing my list. I have been using GoWish and I do honestly love it because it also has a website but my biggest problem is that it requires anyone that wants to view your list to create their own account which can be pretty annoying when you are only trying to view a list for one occasion. I have also used Amazon which is convenient for most as a lot of people use it but you can only link things from amazon, so if there are items from some random clothing website then you cant add it. That is my biggest complaint from amazon. I have also tried Notion and Google docs but those are kinds [...] have also tried Notion and Google docs but those are kinds of wishlist that you have to do every single thing yourself. Which just becomes annoying especially when transferring all of your things when first getting the app. Are their any wishlist apps that you know of that also have website integration, don't require you to sign up or download an app to view the list, and has features like link integration, image attachments, and list filters? I'm looking for wishlists in general, not just Christmas but I thought this would be the best place to post! I also find it helpful when the app allows you to share the link directly from the website to then upload to the app. I use IOS but I think it would be helpful to hear Android options as well!

results.title: 12 Best Universal Wishlist Apps in 2026 (Ranked & Reviewed)
results.content:
Cons: Not a true wishlist app — no gift reservations, group gifting, or purchase tracking. Best used alongside a dedicated app.

Price: Free.

## GiftList's Top Features

GiftList has become a go-to universal wishlist app, offering tools that make gift planning easier at every step. Here's a closer look at what sets GiftList apart.

### AI-Powered Gift Ideas

GiftList's AI assistant, the GiftList Genie, provides personalized gift ideas. Users can describe the recipient in detail and get real product suggestions with live prices to spark inspiration ( Genie also suggests items proactively as you build a list, helping you round it out without starting from a blank page.

### Daily Gift Ideas, Filtered by Age & Gender [...] ### Pinterest: Wishlist Functionality

While Pinterest excels at visual inspiration, it falls short in some areas of gift planning. It lacks features like gift reservation, group gifting, and detailed tracking. This gap explains why many people still turn to specialized apps for more comprehensive gift management.

### Limitations as a Wishlist App

Pinterest is not a one-stop solution for wishlist management. It doesn't offer features like gift reservation tracking, multi-retailer purchase coordination, event reminders, or structured group gifting ( Instead, it's best used as a source of inspiration that complements other gift-planning tools.

Pros: Best-in-class inspiration; secret boards for private planning; deep retailer links. [...] ### Amazon Wishlist: Key Features

| Feature | Details |
 --- |
| List Organization | Create unlimited lists for various occasions ( |
| Privacy Controls | Set lists to private, shared, or public ( |
| Purchase Tracking | Automatically removes purchased items to avoid duplicate gifts ( |
| Smart Integration | Works with Alexa and the Amazon mobile app ( |
| Deal Notifications | Alerts users about price drops on wishlist items ( |

Amazon Wishlist is perfect for managing Amazon-only shopping. You can add notes and prioritize items, making it easier for gift-givers to understand preferences ( The "surprise" feature allows buyers to mark items as purchased while keeping them visible, adding a fun twist for recipients (

### Drawbacks
